DatabaseSetup.Instruction: Execute this SQL in Supabase SQL Editor to build the infrastructure.

StrictRules.NoGradients: Absolutely NO purple, pink, or neon gradients. No "gaming" vibes.
StrictRules.Layout: Sharp corners (0px-4px radius), 1px solid borders (#333), bold sans-serif typography (Inter/Geist).

PythonScraper.Task: 1. Scrape metadata from Samehadaku/Anoboy (Title, Image, Slug). 2. Extract Episode List and Direct/Embed Video Links. 3. Implement 'Upsert' logic: if anime exists, update episodes/sources only. 4. Use 'service_role' key for direct DB insertion via supabase-py.

NextJSFrontend.Task: 1. Build Home Grid with High-Contrast Anime Cards. 2. Build Watch Page with Server Switcher (Tab System for Video Sources). 3. Fully Responsive Mobile-First Design.

ProjectPlan.FinalInstruction: "Antigravity, implement this project as a 100% finished product. No placeholders. No bugs. The design must be sharp, professional, and minimalist. Use the provided Supabase credentials to ensure the backend is fully connected. Deliver the Python Scraper script and the full Next.js project structure."
